request.description:
These `result` objects are returned by the **TripAdvisor Restaurant Search Export** crawler. Each record represents one restaurant listing.

| **Field** | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **id** | integer | Unique identifier for this result record. |
| **object** | string | Always `"result"`. |
| **squid** | string | Hash ID of the squid that produced this result. |
| **run** | string | Hash ID of the run during which this result was scraped. |
| **full_address** | string | Complete address as listed on TripAdvisor, if available. |
| **functions** | object or null | Reserved for function-specific metadata (currently `null`). |
| **image_url** | string or null | URL of the restaurant’s main image or thumbnail. |
| **internal_id** | string | TripAdvisor’s internal identifier for the restaurant. |
| **is_claimed** | boolean | `true` if the business profile is claimed by the owner. |
| **is_michelin** | boolean | `true` if the restaurant has a Michelin distinction. |
| **lat** | number | Latitude coordinate of the restaurant. |
| **lng** | number | Longitude coordinate of the restaurant. |
| **mail** | string or null | Contact email address, if scraped from the listing. |
| **menu** | string or null | URL to the restaurant’s menu on TripAdvisor, if provided. |
| **name** | string | Name of the restaurant. |
| **native_id** | integer | Native numeric ID matching the `id` field. |
| **phone** | string or null | Contact phone number, if listed. |
| **price** | string | Price range indicator (e.g., “€”, “€€-€€€”). |
| **ratings** | integer | Total number of reviews or ratings the restaurant has received. |
| **score** | number | Average rating score (e.g., 1.0–5.0). |
| **scraping_time** | string (ISO) | Timestamp when this result was fetched (e.g., `"2025-07-31T07:20:13.928Z"`). |
| **url** | string | Full URL to the restaurant’s TripAdvisor page. |
| **website** | string or null | Official website URL of the restaurant, if listed. |

response.name: Example
response.body:
{
  "total_results": 1,
  "limit": 100,

        "url": "https://www.tripadvisor.fr/Restaurant_Review-g187147-d1109794-Reviews-Les_Cedres_Du_Liban_Paris-Paris_Ile_de_France.html",
        "website": "https://www.facebook.com/LesCedresDuLiban/"
    }
  ],
  "next": null,

}
